{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211341112C354B1BE28654C5C58C"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614889032111489854","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"老师写的很好，题材有趣，剧情生动。
但我想提个小建议，既然女主身处女尊国，那就没必要“女帝女帝”这样喊，改为皇帝就挺好，不会太刻意。
总而言之老师加油，快快更新，越写越好(◍•ᴗ•◍)❤"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772981300,"group_id":"7605110435880111129","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2UGHCGlgSqPGeElb585Wi2c9JXYj8e/YhvB4tgIK/iB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3844307507216688","user_name":"盛世雪颜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3844307507216688","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605110435880111129","book_info":{"abstract":"【架空女帝王朝+爽文女强+穿书女配+天幕直播+种田基建+偏群像，有迪化，有雄竞修罗场】
修仙界的叶姝在第九十九次渡劫失败后，意外穿越到一本女尊文的暴戾女配身上。
女配实则是位女帝，奈何女帝名声不好，左有丞相不满几欲跳槽，右有摄政大长公主虎视眈眈，前朝满是风雨，后宫全是怨夫。
叶姝：我请问呢？这就是渡劫九十九次失败所要承担的因果吗？
罢了，摆烂，爱咋在地，她不伺候了！
叮，恭喜宿主匹配成功，成功绑定99号败家系统，宿主只需要败光家产，成为亡国之君，便能回归修仙界，渡劫成功，飞升上仙！
叶姝：垂死病中惊坐起！
败家？亡国？
就这朝廷目前的配置，分分钟的事！
水渠？劳民伤财？修！
大坝？费时费力？修！
宫殿？浪费国库？修！
至于后宫……宠，都宠，我是昏君雨露均沾！
叶姝天天向着作死的方向前进，可一天天过去，本就风雨飘摇的王朝好像变得富足强盛起来……
直到有一天，原书女主带着人马前来投奔，俯首称臣，心悦诚服。
直到有一天，天空突然出现一道天幕，说她是千古女帝，流芳百世。
叶姝：说好的昏君呢？说好的亡国呢？怎么和我想的不太一样啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a27a00595a84bcb586484f296a304d70~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东风幻夜","author_id":"","book_id":"7605110435880111129","book_name":"我一昏君，天幕却说我是千古女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0c0a0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3700人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605176810141123097","read_count":"3700","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"151405"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"72","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,位尊权重,系统,穿书","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a27a00595a84bcb586484f296a304d70~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255671&x-signature=vbsAiTOjH7UxvMzFq65wOX%2B6HR8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3538659192870019","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211341112C354B1BE28654C5C58C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4768,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":454},"user
